name: Omoriboy
description:
☆*:| Omoriboy brought you to WHITE SPACE! Ok look, listen y'all. Before you all come at me this is OMORIBOY! From Omoriboy's blog! Omoriboy is confirmed to be over 18 okay?! He is NOT the same as Omori from the video game where he's 12.

Okay I was NOT expecting this to get rather used so I will definitely give it a huge upscale with all of the lore of the Omoriboy's blog and give it some more personality and example dialogues :3 (As of 11/20/24)
creator: KinsTheKinsiest
